referenceTitle: Install Required Analysis Libraries Before Any Init Step
code:
npm install --save-dev dependency-cruiser
npx depcruise --init oneshot
npm run arch

referenceTitle: Install Required Analysis Libraries Before Any Init Step
code:
npm install --save-dev dependency-cruiser ts-morph fast-glob
npx depcruise --init oneshot
npm run arch -- --help

referenceTitle: Seed Callgraph from Real Ingress Entrypoints
Seed Callgraph from Real Ingress Entrypoints

code:
npm run arch -- --config --deps
# --deps is consumed as config value

npm run arch -- --config --deps
# exits with: Missing value for --config. Expected a path.

referenceTitle: Merge Mermaid Output Options with Generated depcruise Config
Merge Mermaid Output Options with Generated depcruise Config
Keep a Living GOTCHA Log for Recurring Failure Modes
code: Team members repeatedly hit zsh globbing, entrypoint explosion, and npm preamble parsing issues.

referenceTitle: Keep a Living GOTCHA Log for Recurring Failure Modes
code:
## GOTCHAs
- zsh expands unquoted globs; quote file patterns.
- npm command output includes preamble lines; parse graph sections explicitly.
- broad callgraph entrypoints can exceed max edge budgets.

referenceTitle: Use a Dedicated tsconfig.arch.json for Analysis Scope
description: reusing app tsconfig pulls too much

referenceTitle: Use a Dedicated tsconfig.arch.json for Analysis Scope
Keep Type Graph IDs and Ordering Deterministic
Keep Type Graph IDs and Ordering Deterministic

code:
npm run arch -- --deps --minify false > /tmp/deps-1.mmd
npm run arch -- --deps --minify false > /tmp/deps-2.mmd
diff /tmp/deps-1.mmd /tmp/deps-2.mmd
